steps.title: Convert square units
steps.content:
Since $1$ meter equals $100$ centimeters, $1$ square meter equals $10{,}000$ square centimeters.
$$
240\ \frac{\text{cm}^2}{\text{hour}}\cdot \frac{1\ \text{m}^2}{10{,}000\ \text{cm}^2}=0.024\ \frac{\text{m}^2}{\text{hour}}
$$

steps.title: Convert hours to minutes
steps.content: There are $60$ minutes in $1$ hour, so divide by $60$. $$ \frac{0.024}{60}=0.0004 $$ The answer is .0004.
